metadata.description: Curated sources for API schema validation, contract testing, AI-powered test generation, and change safety across REST, GraphQL, and gRPC.

specifications.name: OpenAPI Specification
specifications.relevance: Primary schema contract for REST APIs.

specifications.name: JSON Schema (2020-12)
specifications.relevance: OpenAPI 3.1 uses JSON Schema for validation keywords and semantics.

specifications.name: GraphQL Specification
specifications.relevance: Schema and execution semantics for GraphQL APIs.

specifications.name: gRPC Documentation
specifications.relevance: RPC design and tooling reference for gRPC services.

specifications.name: Protocol Buffers Documentation
specifications.relevance: Schema definition and compatibility rules for protobuf.

specifications.name: RFC 7807: Problem Details for HTTP APIs
specifications.relevance: A standard error envelope; helps keep error handling consistent across clients and tests.

tools.name: Spectral API Linter
tools.relevance: Rule-based OpenAPI and AsyncAPI linting for CI/CD governance.

tools.name: OASDiff
tools.relevance: OpenAPI diff and breaking-change detection for PR gates.

tools.name: Pact Contract Testing
tools.relevance: Consumer driven contract testing and CI integration.

tools.name: PactFlow
tools.relevance: Enterprise Pact with AI Code Review, Bi-Directional Contract Testing, and team collaboration.

tools.name: Specmatic
tools.relevance: Schema-driven contract testing and intelligent service virtualisation for OpenAPI and GraphQL.

tools.name: Keploy
tools.relevance: AI-powered automatic test generation from live API traffic with zero-code setup.

tools.name: Schemathesis
tools.relevance: Property-based API testing and schema validation.

tools.name: Prism Mock Server
tools.relevance: OpenAPI mock server and request validation.

tools.name: Buf (Protobuf)
tools.relevance: Protobuf linting, breaking change detection, and schema registry.

tools.name: Postman Documentation
tools.relevance: Collection-driven functional and contract tests for APIs with Postbot AI assistant.

tools.name: GraphQL Inspector
tools.relevance: Schema diffing, linting, breaking change detection, and CI integration for GraphQL.

tools.name: Apollo GraphOS
tools.relevance: Enterprise GraphQL schema management with build checks, operations checks, and contract enforcement.

security.name: OWASP API Security Top 10
security.relevance: Security risk categories to validate in API test plans.
